text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Me? Why, I'm simply speaking like a<n>true monarch
of the turf should. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Pretty cool, doncha thin—I mean,<n>magnificent,
don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urgh... This is harder than I thought!
